name: groundroute
description: Web search for agents — cross-customer pooled cache + price-led routing + reliability/failover, with usage governance. One search tool, OpenAI/Tavily-compatible.

auth.description: Your GroundRoute API key as 'Bearer gr_...'. Get one at https://groundroute.ai/keys

tools.name: search
tools.description: Search the live web across 6 engines and return ranked results (plus a synthesized answer for answer-class queries). Routes each query to the cheapest engine that meets the quality bar and caches repeats. Use this for any current-information, documentation, news, API, or research lookup.
